query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_vendas, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as vendas_aprovadas,
       SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as vendas_concluidas,
       SUM(saleValue) as valor_total_vendas
FROM sales 
WHERE companyId = 'company_1766331506068';

       SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as vendas_aprovadas,
       SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as vendas_concluidas,
       SUM(saleValue) as valor_total_vendas
FROM sales
